profile.title: Profile
profile.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
profile.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 30 characters

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Your subscription determines what features you have access to.

tiktok.title: TikTok
tiktok.description: Connect your TikTok account to post clips and grow your audience.
tiktok.connectSuccessMessage: Your TikTok account has been connected
tiktok.disconnectSuccessMessage: Your TikTok account has been disconnected

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.description: Connect your YouTube account to publish clips directly as YouTube Shorts.
youtube.descriptionConnected: Your YouTube account is connected. You can now publish clips to YouTube.
youtube.connectSuccessMessage: Your YouTube account has been connected
youtube.disconnectSuccessMessage: Your YouTube account has been disconnected

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Account
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get notified when your streamers go live.
notifications.denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings.
notifications.testSentMessage: Check your device — a notification should appear shortly.
notifications.helpPermission: Make sure your browser is allowed to show notifications in your system settings.
notifications.helpFocus: Turn off Do Not Disturb, Focus, or Focus Assist. They silence notifications on Mac, iPhone, Android, and Windows.

watchedHistory.title: Watched videos
watchedHistory.description: You've marked {count} videos as watched. This shows up as a badge on thumbnails so you can tell at a glance which ones you've already seen.

clearConfirm.title: Clear watched history
clearConfirm.message: This will remove the WATCHED badge from {count} videos. They'll appear unwatched again. Continue?

cleared.title: Cleared
cleared.message: Your watched history has been cleared.
